description_long: CoI Designer Toolkit Blueprint authoring tools for Captain of Industry designers. - Update blueprint: replace an existing blueprint from a new area selection while preserving name, description, overlap settings, and book position. - Remembered folder: reopen the blueprint book where you left it. - Operational stats: show workers, electricity, computing, and maintenance in the blueprint detail panel. - Copy as Markdown: copy single-blueprint summaries or recursive folder tables to the clipboard for CoI Hub posts and documentation. - Symmetric normalization: normalize functionally identical balancer/connector orientations in captured blueprints to improve paste-over behavior. Includes a standalone blueprint inspector tool in the package. Designer-only, consumer-free: blueprints remain vanilla-compatible and players using your blueprints do not need this mod installed.
